title: Send a Copy
description: Let respondents receive a copy of their own answers by email
enabled: Email respondents a copy of their answers
enabledDescription: Send the respondent's own submitted answers back to them after they submit the form
noEmailFieldWarning: Add an Email field to your form to enable this — it's used to know where to send the copy.

mode.label: When to send
mode.alwaysDescription: Every respondent automatically receives a copy — no extra step for them.
mode.respondentChoiceDescription: A "Send me a copy of my responses" checkbox appears on the form; only checked submissions get one.

emailField.label: Recipient email field
emailField.hint: The respondent's own answer to this field is used as the recipient address.

pdfTemplate.label: Attach a PDF
pdfTemplate.none: No PDF — send a plain summary instead
pdfTemplate.hint: When no template is selected, the email includes a simple list of the respondent's questions and answers.
pdfTemplate.noTemplatesHint: No PDF Templates exist for this form yet — a plain text summary will be sent instead.

subject.label: Email subject
subject.hint: Leave blank to use the default subject.
